arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals the date Manchester City will discover the verdict of the 115 charges hearing against the Premier League
arts.sum: Mail Sport exclusively revealed that the hearing into the Premier League's charges against City concluded on December 6. The Premier League accused them of multiple breaches of financial rules.

arts.ttl: “Made me feel very loved” – Player on ‘not easy decision’ to leave Manchester City, how manager seduced him
arts.sum: Julián Alvarez has told Saturday’s edition of Marca that it wasn’t easy for him to leave Manchester City for Atlético Madrid in the summer window. The striker spent two seasons at the Etihad, winning the treble in his debut season and the title last season. arts.ttl: Player is ‘among the profiles evaluated’ by Manchester City – Massive fee needed for move
arts.sum: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson has been linked with an exit from the club since the summer transfer window. The Brazilian was said to be close to joining Saudi club Al Nassr but the move never materialised.
